description_long: This is a stone water well with a circular stone base and a cylindrical stone shaft, set on a grassy, polygonal platform. The well is covered by a pitched, red-tiled roof supported by four wooden posts, with the wood showing a natural, slightly curved finish. A metal lantern hangs from one side of the roof, adding a functional and decorative touch. The well features a wooden crank handle and a horizontal wooden beam, likely for drawing water, with a visible chain mechanism. The stonework is rugged and uneven, giving the well a rustic, hand-built appearance. Small stones are scattered on the grassy base, enhancing the naturalistic setting.
description: A rustic stone water well with a red-tiled wooden roof, crank handle, and hanging lantern, set on a grassy base. The well features detailed stonework and wooden supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red-tiled roof, hanging lantern on the left, and the circular stone well with a grassy base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden crank handle, chain mechanism, and the pitched roof's end details.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but the lantern is now on the right and the crank handle is less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the roof, the stone well, and the absence of the crank handle and lantern.
attribute_presence_of_pulley_or_bucket_m: A metal chain and wooden crank handle mechanism are present, mounted horizontally above the well opening.
attribute_surrounding_protective_structu: The well is surrounded by a low, circular stone wall and covered by a pitched wooden roof supported by four posts.
attribute_decorative_elements: A hanging lantern and the curved wooden roof beams serve as decorative elements.
